preconditions: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the Home page is loaded in guest state
Open the Login page using the Home page person/profile button

testCases.title: Open Login page from Home page using person/profile button
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Verify the Home page is displayed in guest state
Click the person/profile button on the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page opens from the Home page and displays Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button in an interactive state.

testCases.title: Verify Login page controls are visible and enabled after opening Login page
steps: Navigate to the Home page in guest state
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page
Observe the Login page controls without entering data
testCases.expectedResult: Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible and enabled for user interaction on the Login page.

testCases.title: Verify password input is masked while typing password characters
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Click inside the Password field
Type the password value Carwash#1 into the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field masks the entered password characters and does not display the plain text password value on screen.

testCases.title: Login successfully using approved valid credentials
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter krisadmin into the Username field
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The application authenticates the user successfully, returns to the Home page in authenticated state, replaces the guest person/profile button with the logged-in user name, and displays authenticated-only features.

testCases.title: Verify failed login with invalid username and valid password
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter invaliduser into the Username field
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, an error message is displayed, the user remains unauthenticated, and the Login page remains visible without transition to authenticated Home state.

testCases.title: Verify failed login with valid username and invalid password
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter krisadmin into the Username field
Enter InvalidPass123 into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, an error message is displayed, the Login page remains open, and the Home page does not transition into authenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify failed login with both username and password invalid
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter invaliduser into the Username field
Enter InvalidPass123 into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected with visible error feedback and the user remains on the Login page in unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify required field validation when Login is clicked with both fields empty
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Leave the Username and Password fields empty
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Required field validation messages are displayed for Username and Password and authentication does not proceed.

testCases.title: Verify Username required validation when Password is entered and Username is blank
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Leave the Username field empty
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: A visible validation message is shown for the required Username field and login is blocked without leaving the Login page.

testCases.title: Verify Password required validation when Username is entered and Password is blank
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter krisadmin into the Username field
Leave the Password field empty
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: A visible validation message is shown for the required Password field and login does not proceed.

testCases.title: Verify login behavior with leading and trailing spaces in both valid credential fields
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter value with spaces around the username as  krisadmin
Enter value with spaces around the password as  Carwash#1
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles leading and trailing spaces according to business behavior and the observed authentication result is consistent and visibly validated on screen.

testCases.title: Verify login rejection with whitespace-only Username and Password values
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter only spaces into the Username field
Enter only spaces into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Whitespace-only values are rejected, required or validation feedback is displayed, and the user remains on the Login page without authentication.

testCases.title: Verify Username field accepts pasted valid value and authenticates successfully
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Paste krisadmin into the Username field
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The pasted Username value is accepted correctly and the user is authenticated successfully to the Home page authenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify Password field accepts pasted password while remaining masked
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter krisadmin into the Username field
Paste Carwash#1 into the Password field
Observe the Password field display
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The pasted password remains masked in the Password field and the valid credentials authenticate the user successfully.

testCases.title: Verify Back button returns the user from Login page to Home page
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Click the Back button on the Login page
testCases.expectedResult: The user is returned to the Home page in guest state after clicking the Back button.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns the user from Login page to Home page
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Click the Home button on the Login page
testCases.expectedResult: The user is returned to the Home page in guest state after clicking the Home button.

testCases.title: Verify authenticated-only features become available after successful login
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter krisadmin into the Username field
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field
Click the Login button
Inspect the Home page after authentication
testCases.expectedResult: Authenticated-only features become available on the Home page and the logged-in user name replaces the guest person/profile control.

testCases.title: Verify invalid login does not transition away from Login page
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter invaliduser into the Username field
Enter wrongpassword into the Password field
Click the Login button
Observe the current page state
testCases.expectedResult: The application remains on the Login page after failed authentication and no authenticated Home page UI is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify username value remains unchanged after failed authentication attempt
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter krisadmin into the Username field
Enter invalidpassword into the Password field
Click the Login button
Observe the Username field after login failure
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page remains visible after authentication failure and the Username field value remains displayed for correction while the user stays unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify special characters in Username field do not authenticate invalid user
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter krisadmin@@@ into the Username field
Enter Carwash#1 into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected with visible error feedback and the application remains in unauthenticated Login state.

testCases.title: Verify very long Username and Password values are handled without application crash
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page
Enter a very long text value exceeding normal username length into the Username field
Enter a very long text value exceeding normal password length into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles oversized input safely by rejecting authentication or showing validation feedback without page crash, broken layout, or unintended authenticated access.
